keyboard: Enter: activate; Space: activate
notes: Use <button> natively; never div+role=button without keyboard handler

optional_aria: aria-label (if text is vague like 'read more')
keyboard: Enter: follow link
notes: Use <a href>; if no href use role=link + tabindex=0 + keyboard handler

keyboard: Space: toggle
notes: Prefer native <input type=checkbox>; aria-checked must be true/false/mixed

required_aria: aria-checked on each radio; aria-labelledby on group
keyboard: Arrow keys: navigate within group; Space: select
notes: Tab enters group; arrows move within; only one radio in tab sequence

required_aria: aria-selected on tab; aria-controls on tab; aria-labelledby on tabpanel
keyboard: Arrow keys: switch tabs; Enter/Space: activate tab; Home/End: first/last tab
focus_management: On tab activate move focus to tab (not panel)
notes: Inactive tabs hidden with hidden attr or tabindex=-1; tabpanel must be keyboard reachable

required_aria: aria-expanded on button; aria-controls on button; id on panel
keyboard: Enter/Space: toggle; Tab: next accordion
notes: Use heading inside button or wrap button in heading; panel uses region role if landmark needed

keyboard: Tab: cycle within dialog; Shift+Tab: reverse; Escape: close
focus_management: Move focus to first focusable element on open; return focus to trigger on close
notes: Inert or aria-hidden the background; no scrolling behind modal

keyboard: Tab: cycle within; Escape: may not close (confirm required)
focus_management: Move focus to dialog on open
notes: Use for confirmations requiring user response; role=alertdialog announces immediately

required_aria: aria-haspopup=menu on trigger; aria-expanded on trigger
optional_aria: aria-disabled on menuitem; aria-checked on menuitemcheckbox
keyboard: Arrow keys: navigate items; Enter/Space: activate; Escape: close; Home/End: first/last
focus_management: Move focus into menu on open; return to trigger on close
notes: Menu != navigation; use for application-style menus (File/Edit); for site nav use nav+ul

keyboard: Arrow Down: open/next; Arrow Up: prev; Enter: select; Escape: close; typing: filter
focus_management: Focus stays on input; use aria-activedescendant to track listbox selection
notes: Chrome needs aria-owns sometimes; test NVDA+Firefox and VoiceOver+Safari separately

required_aria: aria-selected on option; aria-labelledby on listbox
keyboard: Arrow keys: navigate; Space: select (multi); Enter: confirm; Home/End: first/last
focus_management: Focus on listbox container or first option
notes: Single-select: only one aria-selected=true; Multi: multiple allowed

keyboard: Arrow Right: expand/move to child; Arrow Left: collapse/move to parent; Arrow Down/Up: navigate; Enter: activate
notes: aria-expanded only on items with children; leaf nodes omit it

optional_aria: aria-sort on columnheader; aria-selected on row; aria-readonly
keyboard: Arrow keys: navigate cells; Enter: edit mode; Escape: cancel edit; Tab: next interactive in cell
notes: Grid for interactive data; use table+th for read-only data

required_aria: aria-describedby on trigger referencing tooltip id
keyboard: No keyboard interaction (tooltip follows focus/hover)
notes: Never use role=tooltip as the trigger; tooltip must not contain interactive elements; visible on keyboard focus

keyboard: No keyboard needed
notes: Inject into DOM to trigger announcement; don't use display:none toggle; aria-live=assertive interrupts user

keyboard: No keyboard needed
notes: Use for non-urgent updates (form saved, cart updated); polite waits for idle

keyboard: No keyboard needed
notes: Use aria-valuetext for human-readable value (e.g. '3 of 10 steps'); indeterminate: omit valuenow

keyboard: Arrow keys: increment/decrement; Home/End: min/max; Page Up/Down: large step
notes: Step size via aria-valuetext; vertical slider needs aria-orientation=vertical

keyboard: Enter/Space: toggle
notes: Switch ≠ checkbox; use for on/off settings; do not use aria-pressed

keyboard: Tab: navigate links
notes: Last item is current page; optionally not a link

optional_aria: aria-label per page link if text is just a number
keyboard: Tab: navigate links
notes: Each page link needs unique accessible name

keyboard: Enter: activate and move focus to target
focus_management: Move focus to target element (add tabindex=-1 to target)
notes: Must be first focusable element; visible on focus; target needs tabindex=-1 if not normally focusable

keyboard: Enter/Space: toggle
notes: If content is always in DOM use hidden attr; aria-expanded=false means content hidden

keyboard: Tab: navigate controls; Arrow keys if implemented
notes: Pause auto-rotation on hover/focus; provide prev/next controls; each slide: role=group aria-roledescription=slide

required_aria: aria-label on calendar; aria-selected on selected date; aria-current=date on today
keyboard: Arrow keys: navigate days; Page Up/Down: prev/next month; Enter: select; Escape: close
focus_management: Move focus into calendar on open; return to input on close
notes: Provide text input fallback; calendar dialog uses same pattern as modal dialog

required_aria: aria-grabbed (deprecated); use aria-describedby to explain keyboard instructions
keyboard: Tab: reach draggable; Space/Enter: pick up; Arrow keys: move; Space/Enter: drop; Escape: cancel
notes: aria-grabbed is deprecated in ARIA 1.1; prefer cut/paste model or move buttons as keyboard alternative
